chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1374 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.6262/2019 3. For hearing of main case 20.03.2025 Mr. Salman J. Mirza, advocate for the petitioner Per learned counsel the petitioner shall take remedy before the forum of competent jurisdiction in the first instance and if any grievance subsists then the same may be agitated in accordance with law. In view hereof petition is sought to be withdrawn without prejudice to the rights of petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
